---
title: "Utah Housing Affordability Project"
---

<!-- TODO: Add a banner image of Utah (e.g. a landscape or map) -->
<!-- ![Project Banner](your_image.png) -->

<!-- TODO: Write a 2–3 sentence overview of the project: what data is used, what question is being
     answered, and who the intended audience is. -->

[Brief project overview goes here.]

---

## What's Inside

- **[Documentation](Documentation.qmd)** — Data source, variables, and the `utah-housing` Python package.
- **[Tutorial](Tutorial.qmd)** — Step-by-step guide to fetching, cleaning, and exploring the data.
- **[Technical Report](TechnicalReport.qmd)** — EDA, modeling, and findings.
- **[Interactive App](https://stat386utahhousingproject.streamlit.app/)** — Explore the data live with the Streamlit app.

---

<!-- TODO: Add a short "Key Findings" or "Highlights" section once analysis is complete. -->
